author: Almas Abulkhairov
description: Sync and back up your vault across devices with end-to-end encryption. Requires an Obsyncian account; free tier available, paid plans add storage and vault limit - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Almas Abulkhairov
manifest.description: Sync and back up your vault across devices with end-to-end encryption. Requires an Obsyncian account; free tier available, paid plans add storage.
manifest.name: Syncian

name: Syncian

releases.author: aabulkhairov
releases.description:
Fixes a real bug: if you installed the plugin and connected your account within the same Obsidian session (the normal first-run flow — install, log in, link a vault, no restart), auto-sync's file-watch listeners and fallback timer never got registered at all until the next full restart. Now they're always registered and start working immediately once you connect.

Also: opt-out anonymous error reporting (on by default, toggle in Settings — never includes note content or file names), and the sync interval setting is now in seconds (15–3600, default 300) instead of whole minutes.

releases.author: aabulkhairov
releases.description: Fixes a stale-status display bug: right after a sync finished, the sidebar could show "synced HH:MM" while the Sync button still said "Syncing…" until something unrelated refreshed it — confusing, since the sync had actually already completed. Also makes the sidebar's "Last sync — Xm ago" refresh every 30s instead of freezing on whatever it showed when last redrawn.

releases.author: aabulkhairov
releases.description: Fixes: progress bar now updates smoothly instead of jumping in ~500-file chunks (renderer was starved of a chance to repaint during long runs of already-synced files). A sync triggered while another was already running no longer gets silently dropped — it now runs again automatically right after the current one finishes.

releases.author: aabulkhairov
releases.description: Listing name is now Syncian (by Obsyncian). No functional changes.

releases.author: aabulkhairov
releases.description: Automated-review fixes: minAppVersion 1.7.2, popout-window-safe timers, FileManager.trashFile, stricter typing. No functional changes.

releases.author: aabulkhairov
releases.description: First public release: end-to-end encrypted sync and backup for Obsidian vaults. E2EE (AES-256-GCM, encrypted file names), conflict-safe sync with version checking, desktop + mobile, vault sharing, Telegram-based login.
